summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HimPrash EV two-wheeler parts platform iteration 3. All major refactoring successfully implemented: products changed from accessories to EV parts, search functionality added, category quick access added, contact info added, text changes completed.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with 'EV Two-Wheeler Parts' hero badge
Hero subheading shows 'Smart EV Parts Platform built for electric two-wheeler users in India'
Search bar visible on homepage with input, category dropdown, and search button
Category quick access buttons for all 6 categories (Battery, Motor, Controller, Charger, BMS, Wiring)
Featured section shows 'Top EV Parts' heading with 6 featured products
Contact number +91 8707259761 visible in navbar and footer
Active page highlighting works (Home highlighted on homepage, Products on products page)
Products page heading says 'EV Two-Wheeler Parts'
Search functionality works - searching 'battery' filters results correctly
Category dropdown in search bar filters by category
Category checkbox filters work (Battery shows 2, Motor shows 2)
Price range slider goes up to ₹25,000
Product detail shows INR pricing with ₹ symbol
Add to Cart button shows toast notification
Footer shows contact number and 'Made in India for EV builders'
GET /api/products returns 12 EV parts products
GET /api/products?search=battery returns 2 results
GET /api/products?category=Motor returns 2 products
GET /api/categories returns 6 categories: Battery, BMS, Charger, Controller, Motor, Wiring
No old accessories/car products remain - all are EV parts
